tesla_case.question: Who founded Tesla?
tesla_case.llm_answer: Tesla was founded by Elon Musk in 2003.
sample_answers: Tesla was founded in 2003 by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning.
Tesla Motors was started by Martin Eberhard and Marc Tarpenning.
Elon Musk joined Tesla later as an investor and chairman.

apple_case.question: When was Apple founded?
apple_case.llm_answer: Apple was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.
sample_answers: Apple was founded in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.
Apple Computer was started in 1976 by Steve Jobs, Steve Wozniak, and Ronald Wayne.
